title: RNA velocity objects of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells of fetal and adult/control brains
author: Ghobrial, Moheb
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
RNA velocity objects (zip files of .h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells of individual fetal and adult/control brains entities   
   -> part of the manuscript: Single-cell atlas of the human brain vasculature across development, adulthood and disease      https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07493-y    
     
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
   
  -i) Fetal CNS sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from fetal brain (Fetal CNS). 
  - ii) Adult control brain (temporal lobe) sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from adult/control brains (temporal lobes).

 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
   
  -i) Fetal CNS sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from fetal brain (Fetal CNS). 
  - ii) Adult control brain (temporal lobe) sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip:        -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from adult/control brains (temporal lobes).
